reasoning: Without access to real-time late-2025 leaderboard data, I must rely on base rates and historical patterns. Historically, OpenAI and Anthropic are the most aggressive competitors for the #1 spot on Chatbot Arena, continuously releasing model updates to regain the lead if they lose it. Meta releases powerful open-weight models (like Llama 2 and 3) on broader cycles (rarely optimizing simply to claim an Arena win at year-end). While highly competitive, Meta's models rarely hold the absolute top spot against proprietary flagships for long. Given the fierce competition from OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and potentially others, I estimate a low baseline chance (approx 10%) that Meta holds the #1 spot on the specific date of December 31, 2025.
